description:
Add ex_doc and a `docs:` config so hexdocs renders (moduledoc coverage is already excellent — 57/57 modules, @spec on all public fns — but nothing renders it today).

- dep: `{:ex_doc, "~> 0.34", only: :dev, runtime: false}`
- `docs:` with `main: "Mix.Tasks.Mutagen"` (or README), `extras: ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"]`, and `groups_for_modules:` grouping mutators / pipeline facades / core.

Acceptance: `mix docs` builds without error and the README is the landing page.

Tests added: none (config-only ticket)

Summary: Added {:ex_doc, "~> 0.34", only: :dev, runtime: false} to deps/0 and a docs/0 (wired via docs: docs() in project/0) with main: "readme", extras: ["README.md", "CHANGELOG.md"], and groups_for_modules splitting Mutators (~r/^MutagenEx\.Mutators/), Pipeline Facades (~r/^MutagenEx\.Pipeline/), and Core. mix.lock picked up ex_doc 0.40.3 + transitive deps. Package block untouched.

Worker verification: mix deps.get clean; mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean; mix docs builds without error with README as landing page (generated doc/ removed, gitignored). ex_doc emitted pre-existing cross-reference warnings (docstrings referencing hidden ExUnit.Server.add_module/2) — warnings only, do not fail mix docs.

title: Add ex_doc dep + docs config
